sections.Introduction:
Fortunately, I got my work cut out for me with Alien as it turns out, because a rules document for this game was made around 2020 or so. I figured I’d provide a link to it here because it was hidden on Pinside and felt it would benefit from being more widespread. The document provides some background info on the world of the Alien franchise before diving into the game’s rules. Props to everyone involved with the original document.

ipdb.org
2017_ALIEN_Standard_Edition_Rulesheet_Rev_1_2_dated_2020_08_05.pdf
4.08 MB
